# InvestingPro.in — India's Personal Finance Comparison Platform
> Source: https://investingpro.in
> Contact: digitalhustlereal@gmail.com

## About
InvestingPro.in helps Indian consumers compare financial products — credit cards, mutual funds, loans, fixed deposits, demat accounts, insurance, and government schemes (PPF, NPS, ELSS). We provide unbiased, data-driven comparisons with 25+ financial calculators.

## Key Pages

### Product Comparisons
- /credit-cards — Compare 50+ credit cards across Indian banks
- /mutual-funds — Compare 2,500+ mutual funds with live NAV data
- /loans — Compare personal, home, car, and education loans
- /fixed-deposits — Compare FD rates across banks and NBFCs
- /demat-accounts — Compare demat and trading accounts
- /insurance — Compare life, health, and term insurance
- /banking — Compare savings accounts and banking services

### Financial Calculators
- /calculators/sip — SIP Calculator (monthly investment returns)
- /calculators/emi — EMI Calculator (loan repayment)
- /calculators/fd — FD Calculator (fixed deposit maturity)
- /calculators/ppf — PPF Calculator (public provident fund)
- /calculators/swp — SWP Calculator (systematic withdrawal)
- /calculators/income-tax — Income Tax Calculator (old vs new regime)
- /calculators/gratuity — Gratuity Calculator
- /calculators/retirement — Retirement Planning Calculator
- /calculators/fire — FIRE Calculator (financial independence)

### Educational Content
- /glossary — Financial terms glossary (500+ terms)
- /blog — Personal finance articles and guides
- /articles — In-depth financial analysis

### Product Detail Pages
- /credit-cards/[slug] — Individual credit card reviews with pros, cons, rewards
- /mutual-funds/[slug] — Fund details with NAV chart, SIP calculator, holdings
- /credit-cards/compare/[slug] — Head-to-head credit card comparisons

## Data Sources
- AMFI (Association of Mutual Funds in India) — mutual fund NAV data
- mfapi.in — historical NAV and returns data
- RBI — interest rates and banking data
- Bank websites — credit card and loan product data

## Content Guidelines
- All comparisons are independent and unbiased
- Financial data is updated daily via automated pipelines
- Calculator math is validated against standard financial formulas
- Content follows SEBI and RBI compliance guidelines for financial information
